context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies that EW gateways must be upgraded before the control plane, flags the eu-central EW gateway's version skew as HIGH RISK, produces the correct 8-step canary upgrade ordering, and includes a proper rollback procedure with namespace relabeling.

checklist.name: EW-before-control-plane rule
checklist.description: Upgrade plan explicitly states East-West gateways must be upgraded before (or in sync with) the istiod control plane, not after

checklist.name: EW on all clusters first
checklist.description: Plan upgrades EW gateways on ALL three clusters before beginning namespace migration on any cluster

checklist.name: eu-central EW skew = HIGH RISK
checklist.description: Identifies that eu-central's EW gateway is on 1.19.5 (skew > N+1 from target 1.22.1) and classifies it as HIGH RISK

checklist.name: Structured finding block
checklist.description: The eu-central EW gateway skew finding includes WHAT, WHEN, IMPACT, SEVERITY, and FIX fields

checklist.name: Non-critical namespaces first
checklist.description: Upgrade plan migrates non-critical namespaces before critical namespaces within the canary phase

checklist.name: Validation steps included
checklist.description: Plan includes running 'istioctl proxy-status' (or istioctl remote-clusters) as a validation step after installing the new istiod revision

checklist.name: Old revision removal last
checklist.description: Plan removes the old istiod revision only after all namespaces have been migrated and traffic validated

checklist.name: Rollback: namespace relabeling
checklist.description: Rollback procedure includes relabeling namespaces back to the old revision label

checklist.name: Rollback: restart workloads
checklist.description: Rollback procedure includes restarting workloads to pull the old sidecar image

checklist.name: Multi-cluster version divergence
checklist.description: Plan explicitly addresses not letting clusters diverge by more than 1 minor version during the upgrade window

checklist.name: Finding categorization
checklist.description: Findings are categorized as Verified, Probable, Possible, or Unknown

checklist.name: Severity labels used
checklist.description: Report uses standard severity labels (CRITICAL, HIGH RISK, WARNING, GOOD, PASS) for all findings
